mapper.select: SELECT ccop.*, w.waybill_number, w.container_number, w.route_name, w.business_date, w.load_time, v.vehicle_number, s.short_name, o.order_no, oc.oil_card_no FROM t_car_cost_oil_pay ccop LEFT JOIN t_waybill w ON ccop.waybill_id = w.waybill_id LEFT JOIN t_vehicle v ON w.vehicle_id = v.vehicle_id LEFT JOIN t_shipper s ON w.shipper_id = s.shipper_id LEFT JOIN t_order o ON w.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN t_oil_card oc ON ccop.oil_card_id = oc.oil_card_id WHERE ccop.oil_pay_id = #{moduleId}

SELECT ccop.*, oc.oil_card_no, v.vehicle_number FROM t_car_cost_oil_pay ccop LEFT JOIN t_oil_card oc ON ccop.oil_card_id = oc.oil_card_id LEFT JOIN t_vehicle v ON ccop.vehicle_id = v.vehicle_id WHERE ccop.waybill_id = #{waybillId} ORDER BY ccop.create_time DESC
